# Chapter 3: Algorithms and complexity  (~110 pp)
- 3.1 What an algorithm is (10) · 3.2 Time and space complexity (15) · 3.3 Sorting and searching as canonical examples (15) · 3.4 Greedy, divide-and-conquer, dynamic programming (18) · 3.5 Graph algorithms (15) · 3.6 NP-completeness, intractability (15) · 3.7 Approximation and randomisation (12) · 3.8 Failure section: O(n²) algorithms in production at scale (10)

**Archetype**: scaling, optimisation. **Project**: implement and benchmark four sorting algorithms; explain crossover behaviour. **Exercises**: 45.
